posts.title: PR을 더 느리게 만들기 위한 고민
posts.author: long.black
posts.summary: Explores how AI-driven code generation has created a bottleneck in code review. Proposes intentionally slowing PR processes through task decomposition, redesigned PR templates, AI reviewer automation, and differentiated review weight. Argues that slower PRs enable faster development by ensuring thoughtful consideration precedes implementation.

posts.title: 2025 TAM CONNECT: 카카오페이 x 토스, 기술지원의 미래를 함께 그리다
posts.author: james.h
posts.summary: Documents the first TAM CONNECT event where Technical Account Managers from Kakao Pay and Toss shared experiences supporting fintech clients. Covers organizational structure, automation of issue detection using n8n and LLM technology, and cross-company collaboration insights.

posts.title: 공통 컴포넌트를 건강하게 기르기 위한 고민
posts.author: pepe.do, chacha.ah
posts.summary: Examines the lifecycle and management challenges of shared frontend components. Discusses when to create, maintain, and deprecate common components, proposing a headless component pattern that separates logic from visual styling for better maintainability.

posts.title: 2026년 카페개페, AI와 함께한 현장 스케치
posts.author: sunny.ryu
posts.summary: Recap of KakaoPay's internal developer festival (카페개페) for 2026, themed around AI. Featured sessions on Claude Code and AI development tools, networking events, interactive games, and team demos. Achieved 77% participation rate among technical staff (470+ attendees) with 4.44/5.0 satisfaction score.

posts.title: 수억 건의 데이터, 맛있게 쪼개 먹는 방법 (with. Partitioning)
posts.author: wi.fi
posts.summary: Technical article on efficiently processing hundreds of millions of records using Spring Batch partitioning to solve OOM issues in ledger statistics regeneration. Achieved ~10.9x performance improvement (97 min → 9 min for 5M records) using partitioning, MongoCursorItemReader streaming, and bulk operations.

posts.title: OpenAPI Specification을 이용한 더욱 효과적인 API 문서화
posts.author: Jay
posts.summary: Explores combining Swagger and Spring REST Docs using the restdocs-api-spec library to generate OpenAPI Specification files from integration tests. Achieves both attractive UI and test-driven documentation quality, with added benefits of Postman and API client compatibility.
